message:
feat(rch): expose compilation slot/timeout config fields and wire them through remote execution

- Add 7 new fields to ConfigCompilationSection: build_slots, test_slots,
  check_slots (parallelism controls) and build_timeout_sec,
  test_timeout_sec, bun_timeout_sec, external_timeout_enabled (timeout
  controls for different compilation command types)
- Surface all new fields in both config show (human-readable with source
  annotations) and config export (JSON) commands
- Remove #[cfg(test)] gate from TransferPipeline::with_compilation_config()
  so the method is available at runtime, not just in tests
- Wire compilation_config through to TransferPipeline in both remote
  execution paths within execute_remote_compilation(), enabling the
  remote worker to respect per-command-type slot limits and timeouts
- Update test fixtures and assertions to cover the new config fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
